serializableData.oldContent: All symbols pay from left to right. Scatters pay on any position.
The baboons are wild and substitute for all symbols except scatter.

5 - 150 free spins; 3x multiplier
4 - 100 free spins; 2x multiplier
3 - 50 free spins; 1x multiplier
Hit 3 or more Banana symbols anywhere on the screen to win up to 150 free spins.
All symbols pay from left to right. Scatters pay on any position.
Free Spins win is added to the payline win. All wins are multiplied by bet per line.

During free spins 3 or more banana symbols anywhere on the screen give an additional 15 free spins.
No limits.
The baboons are wild and substitute for all symbols except scatter.

5 - 150 free spins; 3x multiplier
4 - 100 free spins; 2x multiplier
3 - 50 free spins; 1x multiplier
Hit 3 or more Banana symbols anywhere on the screen to win up to 150 free spins.
All symbols pay from left to right. Scatters pay on any position.
Free Spins win is added to the payline win. All wins are multiplied by bet per line.
All symbols pay from left to right. Scatters pay on any position.

During free spins 3 or more banana symbols anywhere on the screen give an additional 15 free spins.
No limits.

You can hit GAMBLE after every win to access gamble screen.
Your goal is to guess whether the next card will be red or black.

You can hit GAMBLE after every win to access gamble screen.
Your goal is to guess whether the next card will be red or black.

Bet that next card is Black
Win 2x your current amount

Bet that next card is Black.
Win 2x your current amount.

Bet that next card is Red.
Win 2x your current amount.

Bet that next card is Red
Win 2x your current amount
Collect your current win and return to main game.
Collect your current win and return to main game.
Gamble limit - maximum 500 x bet, up to 5 cards.
Gamble limit - maximum 500 x bet, up to 5 cards.
5x WILD symbols pay according to the WILD symbol paytable.
Hit 3 or more          anywhere on the reels to trigger the FREE SPINS FEATURE.
All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
This symbol is both SCATTER and WILD and substitutes for all symbols.
Only the highest win is paid per line.

All symbols pay from left to right on selected paylines.
Free Spins win is added to the payline win.
All wins are multiplied by bet per line.
All values are expressed as actual wins in coins.

In the FREE SPINS FEATURE, 10 free spins are awarded.
Before the round starts a special expanding symbol is selected randomly.
During the FREE SPINS, after the payout of regular symbols, the special symbol expands vertically to cover all 3 positions on the reel.
The special expanding symbol pays according to its paytable, on all reels, even on non-adjacent positions.
Expansion is triggered only if enough symbols for a win are present.
High volatility games pay out less often on average but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher.
Hitting 3 or more           symbols during the FREE SPINS ROUND awards 10 more free spins with the currently selected special symbol. There is no limit to the number of possible re-triggers
The FREE SPINS ROUND with 10 starting free spins can be instantly triggered from the base game by buying it for 100x current total bet.
The FREE SPINS ROUND with 10 starting free spins can be instantly triggered from the base game by buying it for 100x current total bet.

During the FREE SPINS, after the payout of regular symbols, the special symbol expands vertically to cover all 3 positions on the reel.
The special expanding symbol pays according to its paytable, on all reels, even on non-adjacent positions.
Expansion is triggered only if enough symbols for a win are present.
All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
Only the highest win is paid per line.
This symbol is both SCATTER and WILD and substitutes for all symbols.

All symbols pay from left to right on selected paylines.
Free Spins win is added to the payline win.
All wins are multiplied by bet per line.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
Hit 3 or more         anywhere on the reels to trigger the FREE SPINS FEATURE.
In the FREE SPINS FEATURE, 10 free spins are awarded. Before the round starts a special expanding symbol is selected randomly.
High volatility games pay out less often on average but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher.
Hitting 3 or more          symbols during the FREE SPINS ROUND awards 10 more free spins with the currently selected special symbol. There is no limit to the number of possible re-triggers
5x WILD symbols pay according to the WILD symbol paytable.

serializableData._text: 奖励按从左到右顺序支付，Scatter奖励则不论位置。
狒狒替代除了SCATTER之外的所有符号。

5 - 150 免费旋转; 3x 乘数
4 - 100 免费旋转; 2x 乘数
3 - 50 免费旋转; 1x 乘数

当屏幕上出现3只或以上香蕉符号时，
可以赢得最多150次免费旋转。
奖励按从左到右顺序支付，Scatter奖励则不论位置。
派彩线会列出所赢得的免费旋转。所赢奖励将会与每条线的投注相乘
在免费旋转期间，屏幕上出现3只或以上香蕉又能赢得15次免费旋转。没有限制。
狒狒替代除了SCATTER之外的所有符号。

4 - 100 免费旋转; 2x 乘数
3 - 50 免费旋转; 1x 乘数

奖励按从左到右顺序支付，Scatter奖励则不论位置。

派彩线会列出所赢得的免费旋转。
所赢奖励将会与每条线的投注相乘
奖励按从左到右顺序支付，Scatter奖励则不论位置。

在免费旋转期间，
屏幕上出现3只或以上香蕉又能赢得15次免费旋转。没有限制。

赢后点击GAMBLE按键，跳转到赌博页面。
猜测下一张牌是黑色还是红色。

赢后点击GAMBLE按键，跳转到赌博页面。
猜测下一张牌是黑色还是红色。

猜下一张牌为黑色
赢得您本次支付的两倍。

猜下一张牌为黑色
赢得您本次支付的两倍。

猜下一张牌为红色
赢得您本次支付的两倍。

猜下一张牌为红色
赢得您本次支付的两倍。
收取赢利并返回主游戏。
收取赢利并返回主游戏。
赔付上限 – 高达1000倍您的派彩线赌注，最多五次。
赔付上限 – 高达1000倍您的派彩线赌注，最多五次。
根据 WILD 符号赔付表赔付 5 个 WILD 符号
转轴上的任意位置出现3个或更多           可触发免费旋转功能。
从最左侧的卷轴起临近卷轴上所有符号从左向右支付。
系统故障期间所有游戏及赔付无效。
如果多条支付线上有赢奖，则所有赢奖都将加入到总赢奖中。
这个图案既是Scatter, 又是可以代替所有图案的Wild。
每条派彩线上仅仅支付最高奖金。

奖励按从左到右顺序支付
免费旋转将加入线赢。所有赢利都将倍乘线注。
所有数值表示为钱币的实际赢金

在免费旋转功能中，将奖励10次免费旋转。
在回合开始之前，会随机挑选一个特殊扩展符号。
在免费旋转过程中， 常规符号赔付完成后， 特殊符号将垂直扩展， 从而出现在转轴的所有三个位置上。
所有转轴上的特殊扩展符号均按照其赔付表进行赔付， 即使是在不相邻的位置也一样。
仅在有足够的符号构成奖励组合时才会扩展。
波动性较高的游戏通常较少赔付，但在短时间内赢取大奖的几率更高

在免费旋转回合期间出现3个或更多        符号将额外奖励10次包含当前选
定特殊符号的免费旋转。可重新触发的次数没有限制。
在基本游戏中以100x当前总赌注进行购买即可马上触发包含10次初始免费旋转的免费旋转回合。

在基本游戏中以100x当前总
